auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Spider Cloud API key sent as a Bearer token. Create or manage keys at https://spider.cloud/api-keys.

actions.name: get_credits
actions.description: Get the available credits for the connected Spider Cloud account.

inputSchema.description: No input is required to get Spider Cloud credits.

data.description: The JSON payload returned by Spider Cloud.

actions.name: get_links
actions.description: Extract links from one public URL with Spider Cloud.

url.description: The public URL whose links Spider Cloud should extract.

request.description: The retrieval engine Spider Cloud should use.

respect_robots.description: Whether Spider Cloud should respect the target site's robots rules.

cache.description: Whether Spider Cloud may use a cached response.

request_timeout.description: The upstream page request timeout in milliseconds.

inputSchema.description: Input for extracting links from one public URL with Spider Cloud.

data.description: The JSON payload returned by Spider Cloud.

actions.name: scrape
actions.description: Scrape one public URL with Spider Cloud and return its JSON response.

url.description: The public URL Spider Cloud should scrape.

request.description: The retrieval engine Spider Cloud should use.

return_format.description: The JSON-compatible page content format to return.

readability.description: Whether Spider Cloud should apply readability processing.

metadata.description: Whether Spider Cloud should include page metadata.

return_page_links.description: Whether Spider Cloud should include links found on the page.

filter_output_main_only.description: Whether Spider Cloud should keep only main-page content.

respect_robots.description: Whether Spider Cloud should respect the target site's robots rules.

cache.description: Whether Spider Cloud may use a cached response.

request_timeout.description: The upstream page request timeout in milliseconds.

delay.description: The delay in milliseconds before Spider Cloud captures page content.

inputSchema.description: Input for scraping one public URL with Spider Cloud.

data.description: The JSON payload returned by Spider Cloud.

actions.name: search
actions.description: Search the web with Spider Cloud and optionally fetch result-page content.

search_limit.description: The maximum number of search results to retrieve.

fetch_page_content.description: Whether Spider Cloud should fetch content from each search result.

location.description: The location name used to localize search results.

country.description: The country code used to localize search results.

language.description: The language code used to localize search results.

page.description: The 1-indexed search result page to retrieve.

request.description: The retrieval engine Spider Cloud should use.

return_format.description: The JSON-compatible page content format to return.

inputSchema.description: Input for a Spider Cloud web search.

data.description: The JSON payload returned by Spider Cloud.
